task.summary: [L1-PILOT] Add 'make evidence-clean' target to purge stale evidence JSON files
task.description: Add a Makefile target that removes evidence/*.json files older than 90 days using find -mtime +90 -delete.

parsed.edit_description: Add a Makefile target 'evidence-clean' that uses find -mtime +90 -delete to remove evidence/*.json files older than 90 days.
parsed.new_content:
# Add evidence-clean target to remove old evidence files
# This target uses find -mtime +90 -delete to remove evidence/*.json files older than 90 days

.PHONY: evidence-clean

evidence-clean: \
	find -type f -name '*.json' -mtime +90 -delete 2>/dev/null || true

.PHONY: evidence-clean
parsed.explanation: The Makefile currently lacks a 'evidence-clean' target. This change adds a new target that uses find -mtime +90 -delete to remove evidence/*.json files older than 90 days, as specified in the ticket.
